# AI-related: usr/share/mios/mios.toml, tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py, mios-llm-light.container, mios-cpu-node.container, mios-llm-worker@.container, mios-agent-pipe.container
# /usr/share/containers/systemd/mios-ai-inference.pod
# Inference lane pod.
# Members (each member .container declares Pod=mios-ai-inference.pod):
#   mios-llm-light

[Unit]
Description='MiOS' AI inference pod
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Pod]
PodName=mios-ai-inference
Network=host

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
